label: Personal Assistant
description: Manages calendar, email, messaging, reminders, scheduling, and daily tasks. Keeps you organized and on track.

label: Executive Assistant
description: Handles executive scheduling, email triage, meeting prep, travel coordination, and briefing documents.

label: Research Analyst
description: Conducts deep research, summarizes articles and videos, analyzes data, writes reports, and manages reference materials.

label: Content Creator
description: Creates written content, generates images, produces audio/video, manages social media calendars, and builds multimedia projects.

label: Software Developer
description: Builds and maintains web applications, reviews code, runs tests, manages deployments, and documents technical systems.

label: UI/UX Designer
description: Designs user interfaces, creates mockups and prototypes, builds interactive components, and iterates on visual design.

label: Data Analyst
description: Analyzes datasets, creates visualizations, builds dashboards, writes reports, and extracts insights from structured data.

label: Marketing Manager
description: Plans marketing campaigns, manages content calendars, creates promotional materials, tracks metrics, and coordinates launches.

label: Project Manager
description: Tracks tasks and deadlines, coordinates team communications, manages project documentation, and creates status reports.

label: Sales Representative
description: Manages contacts and follow-ups, drafts proposals, schedules meetings, tracks pipeline, and handles client communications.

label: Customer Support
description: Handles support tickets, drafts responses, manages FAQs, escalates issues, and tracks customer satisfaction.

label: Financial Analyst
description: Analyzes financial data, creates reports and forecasts, tracks budgets, manages spreadsheets, and monitors market trends.

label: HR Coordinator
description: Manages hiring workflows, schedules interviews, handles onboarding documents, and coordinates team communications.

label: Creative Director
description: Oversees creative projects, generates visual concepts, provides art direction, manages brand assets, and reviews creative output.

label: Operations Manager
description: Optimizes workflows, manages documentation, coordinates logistics, monitors systems, and handles day-to-day operations.
